children.text: Introduction & Challenge: Once there lived an old man called Yu Gong. Two high mountains stopped his family from walking to the other side. So Yu Gong decided to move the mountains.
children.translation: 引入与挑战：从前有一个叫愚公的老人。两座大山阻挡了他的家人走到另一边。所以愚公决定移山。

children.text: Once there lived an old man called Yu Gong.
children.translation: 从前有一个名叫愚公的老人。

children.text: Two high mountains stopped his family from walking to the other side.
children.translation: 两座高山阻挡了他的家人走到另一边。

children.text: So Yu Gong decided to move the mountains.
children.translation: 所以愚公决定把山移走。

children.text: Action & Conflict: Although Yu Gong was old, he decided to move the mountains with his family. So Yu Gong started digging. At that time, a 'clever' man called Zhi Sou laughed at him and told him that it was impossible to move such high mountains. But Yu Gong didn't listen to him and said that his sons and grandsons would continue to move the mountains after he died. Then a god was moved by Yu Gong so he sent two gods to help him move the mountains.
children.translation: 行动与冲突：虽然愚公年纪大了，但他决定和家人一起移山。于是愚公开始挖山。那时，一个名叫智叟的“聪明”人嘲笑他，并告诉他移动如此高的山是不可能的。但愚公没有听他的话，并说在他死后，他的儿子和孙子们将继续移山。后来，一位神仙被愚公感动了，于是派了两位神仙来帮他移山。

children.text: Although Yu Gong was old, he decided to move the mountains with his family.
children.translation: 虽然愚公年岁已高，但他决心和家人一起移开大山。

children.text: So Yu Gong started digging.
children.translation: 于是愚公开始挖掘。

children.text: At that time, a 'clever' man called Zhi Sou laughed at him and told him that it was impossible to move such high mountains.
children.translation: 那时候，一个名叫智叟的“聪明”人嘲笑他，并对他说要移动这么高的山是不可能的。

children.text: But Yu Gong didn't listen to him and said that his sons and grandsons would continue to move the mountains after he died.
children.translation: 但是愚公没有听他的，并且说在他死后，他的子子孙孙将继续移山。

children.text: Then a god was moved by Yu Gong so he sent two gods to help him move the mountains.
children.translation: 然后一位神仙被愚公感动了，所以他派了两个神仙来帮他移山。

children.text: Conclusion & Lesson: The story reminds us that nothing is impossible as long as we work hard. We should not give up.
children.translation: 结论与启示：这个故事提醒我们，只要我们努力，没有什么是不可完成的。我们不应该放弃。

children.text: The story reminds us that nothing is impossible as long as we work hard.
children.translation: 这个故事提醒我们，只要努力，世上无难事。
children.highlight: reminds us that ... as long as

children.text: We should not give up.
children.translation: 我们不应当放弃。

tree.translation: 愚公移山的故事（高级版）

children.text: Introduction & Challenge: Once upon a time, there lived an old man named Yu Gong whose house was blocked by two enormous mountains. In order to make it easier for his family to travel, Yu Gong made a bold decision to move these mountains away.
children.translation: 引入与挑战：从前，有一个名叫愚公的老人，他的房子被两座巨大的山挡住了。为了让家人出行更方便，愚公做出了一个大胆的决定：把这些大山移走。

children.text: Once upon a time, there lived an old man named Yu Gong whose house was blocked by two enormous mountains.
children.translation: 从前，住着一个名叫愚公的老人，他的房子被两座巨大的高山挡住了。
children.highlight: Once upon a time, there lived ... whose

children.text: In order to make it easier for his family to travel, Yu Gong made a bold decision to move these mountains away.
children.translation: 为了方便家人出行，愚公做出了移走这些大山的大胆决定。
children.highlight: In order to make it easier for sb to do sth

children.text: Action & Conflict: Although he was extremely old, Yu Gong led his family to start digging day after day. However, a man named Zhi Sou laughed at their efforts, claiming that it was completely impossible for them to achieve the goal. Instead of giving up, Yu Gong firmly replied that even after his death, his sons and grandsons would keep digging. Deeply moved by their determination, a god finally sent two giants to carry the mountains away.
children.translation: 行动与冲突：虽然他年纪非常大了，愚公还是带领着他的家人日复一日地开始挖山。然而，一个叫智叟的人嘲笑他们的努力，声声称他们完全不可能实现这个目标。愚公非但没有放弃，反而坚定地回答说，即使在他死后，他的子子孙孙也会继续挖下去。一位神仙被他们的决心深深感动，最终派了两个巨人把山运走了。

children.text: Although he was extremely old, Yu Gong led his family to start digging day after day.
children.translation: 尽管他年事已高，愚公依然带领家人开始日复一日地挖掘。

children.text: However, a man named Zhi Sou laughed at their efforts, claiming that it was completely impossible for them to achieve the goal.
children.translation: 然而，一个名叫智叟的人嘲笑他们的努力，声称他们绝不可能实现这一目标。

children.text: Instead of giving up, Yu Gong firmly replied that even after his death, his sons and grandsons would keep digging.
children.translation: 愚公非但没有放弃，反而坚定地回答说，即使在他去世后，他的子孙后代也会继续挖下去。

children.text: Deeply moved by their determination, a god finally sent two giants to carry the mountains away.
children.translation: 被他们的决心深深感动，一位神仙最终派了两个巨人把大山移走了。

children.text: Conclusion & Lesson: In conclusion, this meaningful story reminds us that nothing is impossible as long as we face challenges bravely. Therefore, whenever we are in trouble, we should never give up our dreams.
children.translation: 结论与启示：总而言之，这个富有深意的故事提醒我们，只要我们勇敢面对挑战，就没有什么是不可战胜的。因此，每当我们遇到困难时，都永远不应该放弃我们的梦想。

children.text: In conclusion, this meaningful story reminds us that nothing is impossible as long as we face challenges bravely.
children.translation: 总而言之，这个充满教育意义的故事提醒我们，只要我们勇敢地面对挑战，就没有什么是做不到的。

children.text: Therefore, whenever we are in trouble, we should never give up our dreams.
children.translation: 因此，每当我们身处逆境，我们绝不应该放弃梦想。
